name: Subhajit Pradhan
role: Software Engineer - Developer Tools, AI Systems, Full Stack
summary: Software engineer building developer tools, AI workflows, and full-stack systems with clear data boundaries, inspectable architecture, and source-backed tradeoffs.

experience.title: Full Stack Software Developer
bullets: Designed and shipped full-stack features with Next.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL in a startup product environment.
Built backend APIs and job-processing systems, then diagnosed production issues and optimized database queries.
Implemented authentication, role-based access control, caching, and analytics across frontend and backend services.

experience.title: Software Developer Intern
bullets: Architected modular Next.js applications with performance-focused rendering and backend API boundaries.
Built blockchain-integrated workflows with smart contract interactions and transaction monitoring.

experience.title: Software Engineering Trainee
bullets: Built and deployed Internet Computer smart contracts with Motoko and Rust, then developed canister-backed applications.

projects.name: RLS Doctor
bullets: Built a read-only Postgres/Supabase RLS auditor that reports disabled RLS, broad policies, missing WITH CHECK clauses, and hardening gaps for local and CI review.
Packaged an installable Agent Skill and added GitHub Actions plus disposable Postgres integration coverage.

projects.name: SmritiFlow
bullets: Built a repository-memory CLI that generates cache, project-map, scan-report, AGENTS.md, and docs/ai artifacts for coding-agent handoffs.
Implemented init, scan, refresh, status, and resume workflows with tests and repo-hosted Agent Skill packaging.

projects.name: Tarka Sabha
bullets: Built a multi-agent debate platform with configurable personas, multi-provider routing, and sequential or mention-aware orchestration.
Encrypted provider API keys at rest with AES-256-GCM and separated workflow state from provider-specific calls.

projects.name: CSCosmos
bullets: Built a typed computer-science learning hub with domain/topic routes, search, live versus coming-soon states, and links to focused microsites.

skills.label: Languages
skills.value: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Go, Rust, SQL, Java, C++

skills.value: React, Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, GraphQL, Tailwind CSS
